items.title: Paper accepted at WACV 2026
items.summary: Our work on robust visual representation learning was accepted for publication.

items.title: Weekly seminar on efficient vision-learning models
items.summary: Lab members shared current experiments and discussion notes from ongoing projects.

items.title: New winter-term interns joined the lab
items.summary: New student researchers joined projects in biomedical AI and real-world deployment.

items.title: New multi-GPU workstation installed
items.summary: A dedicated training workstation was added to support larger vision and learning experiments.

items.title: Best Student Presentation Award
items.summary: CVL-Lab received a student presentation award for work on trustworthy computer vision.

items.title: Industry collaboration visit hosted
items.summary: Research exchange session held with an industrial R&D team on applied vision and learning systems.

items.title: Lab workshop on biomedical vision pipelines
items.summary: Internal workshop covered annotation quality, uncertainty, and deployment constraints.

items.title: Paper accepted in Medical Image Analysis
items.summary: A medical imaging paper from CVL-Lab was accepted after peer review.

items.title: Congratulations to spring graduates
items.summary: We congratulate graduating students and thank them for their contributions to the lab.
